name: ballpark-bingo
description: Stitched interactive MLB Live Bingo PWA — fully offline-capable, installable, with wake lock, auto-save, and instant tap protection.

scripts.build: echo 'Static PWA — no build step required. Icons and assets are ready in /icons. Deploy the folder as-is.'
scripts.icons:info: echo 'PWA icons live in icons/ (192, 512, 180). Replace with your own branded PNGs for production.'
